title: デビュー戦の後に・ここから始まる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After successfully making her debut, Winning
Ticket is so overcome with emotion that she
bursts into tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From here on, the real challenge for the two of us
begins!
